case_title: HAI TRAN ONG VS. DANG TRINN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONG, HAI TRAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINN, DANG $1,717.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,802.00, THE DAMAGES AWARDED ARE FOR THOSE TRANSACTIONS WHICH ARE NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,448.65 FILED BY ONG, HAI TRAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINN, DANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINITFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. ONLY. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-08-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRINN, DANG
